Finance AI · Overview
High confidenceWooCommerce + LedgerSynced just now
Margin pressure
CM3 at 34.9% — delivery costs up 18% this month
Shipping now 12% of revenue vs 10% last quarter. Review carrier rates and parcel mix.
Pending classification
4 receipts need classification — $18,400 unmatched
Largest: $12,400 supplier invoice. Classify to keep your books accurate before month close.
Cost alert
2 recurring costs increased without review
Logistics provider +15%, communications platform +22%. Review before month close.

Magellan · Tax
Reserve covers the Q1 payment due Jun 7 but falls $54K short of full Q2 liability if profit pace holds. Recommend setting aside $54K more from June inflows. Does not affect runway.
